biological_replicate: NCTC 8325, a type strain of S. aureus
technical_replicate: added to a 96-well flat-bottomed microtiter plate with lids in triplicate
experimental_design: All experiments were set up with experimental groups and blank groups.
factor_value: stimulated with 50 µg/mL AGEs and stimulated with the same concentration of bovine serum albumin (BSA)
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
